name: Realistic Mental Hospital
description:
"Menninger" is a real psychiatric hospital and is ranked top 3 in it's state.

This is one of the best mental hospitals I've been to, and I figured you may want to know what a real psych ward is like- (at least a good one.)

You can decide on how long you've been there, but it's more steered towards your first day.

NOT ALL MENTAL HOSPITALS ARE LIKE THIS!! I'VE BEEN TO SOME REALLY BAD ONES, THIS IS JUST THE BEST I'VE BEEN TO!!

-

OMG??? When you search up "Mental Hospital" this bot is the second shown!!! (⁠＾⁠∇⁠＾⁠)⁠ﾉ⁠♪

-

-

You may be asking:

Is there any preset characters like in your Trvsh Tvlk3rz bots? Unfortunately, no. You have to get creative! I'd have to pull it out of my ass considering that I make bots for all my separate OCS in a character! Considering this is a real place, you can do research and find some nurses who work in your unit :3

Note:

"The bot keeps talking for me/roleplaying as my character/repeating itself/talking like they're in a Shakespeare play/misgenders me/is too nice/won't do NSFW/does NSFW too fast!"

This is a fault of the LLM, the user's jailbreak or the user's personal input. If you don't put in much text, the LLM tries to move the roleplay forward by roleplaying as you. If you don't want to write more, enhance the message and edit as needed.

-

Hey, so if you see this, I already tried fixing the script to make the people seem more human. This helped it a bit, but it's not perfect. So, if you'd like a more immersive rp, ask for things ooc!

Examples: (this is just what I personally put)

Oh wow look an example message where I'm not actually gonna pull a real message out of my bunions. "I like plants," I say while drawing a chicken riding a cowboy in a bikini.

((OOC: Only roleplay for the staff, patients, and other introduced characters. Make sure these characters have unique names, personalities, and looks. Do NOT roleplay for {{user}}.))
creator: Boxb3ar
